popularStory.headline:
Alice Tomes Welles
(1 December 1595 – 4 May 1645)
popularStory.description:
Born in 1595 in Stourton, Whichford, Warwick, England to John & Ellen (Gunn) Tomes. 

Married: Thomas Wells, future governer of Connecticut, in 7 July 1615 in Long Marston, Gloucester, England. Died 1 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Tomes於1592年12月1日出生在英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃時，她的父親John Tomes47歲，母親Ellen Gunne21歲。她於1615年9月28日與Governor Thomas Welles在英國奧可福爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1645年5月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年52歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Tomes于1592年12月1日出生在英国瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃时，她的父亲John Tomes47岁，母亲Ellen Gunne21岁。她于1615年9月28日与Governor Thomas Welles在英国奧可福爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1645年5月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年52岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Tomes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Czech (Tomeš): from a variant of the personal name Tomáš (see Thomas ).
Spanish (Tomés): from a derivative of the personal name Tomás (see Thomas ).

variants.name: Toms
meanings: English (Cornwall, Devon and Dorset): variant of Thom , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Tomes was born on 1 December 1592, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, her father, John Tomes, was 47 and her mother, Ellen Gunne, was 21. She married Governor Thomas Welles on 28 September 1615, in Drayton, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 4 May 1645, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 52, and was buried in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Tomes est née le 1 décembre 1592, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, John Tomes, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Ellen Gunne, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Governor Thomas Welles le 28 septembre 1615, à Drayton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 mai 1645, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Tomes am 1. Dezember 1592 in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Tomes 47 und ihre Mutter Ellen Gunne 21. Sie hat am 28. September 1615 in Drayton, Oxfordshire, England Governor Thomas Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Mai 1645 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Tomes è nata il il 1 dicembre 1592 nel Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, John Tomes, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Ellen Gunne, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Governor Thomas Welles il 28 settembre 1615, nel Drayton, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 maggio 1645, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Tomesが1592年12月1日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンで生まれた時，父John Tomesは47歳，母Ellen Gunneは21歳であった。1615年9月28日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアドレイトンでGovernor Thomas Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1645年5月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで52歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドヴィラッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Tomes(이)가 1592년 12월 1일 영국 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Tomes(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Gunne(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1615년 9월 28일 영국 스퍼드실르 드라이턴에서 Governor Thomas Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1645년 5월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.1 December 1592–4 May 1645: 1 de dezembro de 1592–4 de maio de 1645

pt.Long Marston, Stratford-upon-Avon, Warwi: Long Marston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Tomes nasceu em 1 de dezembro de 1592, em Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Tomes, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Gunne, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Governor Thomas Welles em 28 de setembro de 1615, em Drayton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de maio de 1645, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony,: хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford: вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Tomes родилась 1 декабря 1592 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Tomes было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Gunne, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Governor Thomas Welles 28 сентября 1615 г. в местности дреитон, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 4 мая 1645 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Tomes nació el 1 de diciembre de 1592, en Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Tomes, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Ellen Gunne, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Governor Thomas Welles el 28 de septiembre de 1615, en Drayton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1645, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
